description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs in dark gray. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped garden with shrubs and a blossoming tree. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with a patio, outdoor seating area, and a pergola-covered section, as well as a swimming pool. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is bordered by a dark fence, with additional greenery and decorative elements enhancing the curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with dark gable and flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a double garage, and a backyard featuring a patio, pergola, and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, driveway, and landscaped garden with a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, green lawn, pergola, and swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, patio, outdoor seating, and extensive windows and sliding doors.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the lawn, pergola, and the transition between the garage and main living areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors at the rear
